description: Aesop configuration. Precedence: environment variables > config file > built-in defaults.

_paths.aesop_root: Set via AESOP_ROOT env var (no config key)
_paths.brain_root: Set via BRAIN_ROOT env var; default: {aesop_root}/../.claude
_paths.scripts_root: Set via SCRIPTS_ROOT env var; default: {aesop_root}/../scripts
_paths.temp_root: Set via TEMP_ROOT env var; default: system temp + /claude
_paths.state_root: Set via AESOP_STATE_ROOT env var; default: {aesop_root}/state
